performanceNotifications.title: Late Dispatch Rate Approaching Threshold
performanceNotifications.message: Your late dispatch rate of 1.8% is approaching the 4% target. Please ensure orders are dispatched by the expected ship date during the summer heatwave logistics window.

performanceNotifications.title: Listing Suppressed - Missing Product Image
performanceNotifications.message: Your listing for SKU SM-PICUAL-5L has been suppressed due to a missing main product image. Please upload a compliant image to reactivate.

performanceNotifications.title: FBA Inventory Restock Recommendation
performanceNotifications.message: Based on your sales velocity, we recommend restocking SM-PICUAL-500 and SM-HOJI-500 within the next 14 days to avoid stockouts ahead of the autumn harvest demand.
